title: Opinion: Opinion | Shadow Wars: The 'Inside Networks' Helping Israel Target Iran And Its Leaders
summary_full: Over the past four weeks, with Tangsiri being the latest example, Israel has showcased that its war with Iran was being waged over the years in the shadows of espionage, intelligence, and covert operations.
